MINI MINUTES:

No appearances in Open Court. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

DEFENDANTs ORTHOPEDIC PHYSICAL THERAPY AND WELLNESS, INC., DBA ORTHOPEDIC REHABILITATION AND WELLNESS, INC.'s Motion To Enforce Settlement Agreement.

Defendant Orthopedic Physical Therapy and Wellness, Inc.'s Motion To Enforce Settlement Agreement is OFF CALENDAR.

The motion is based on sealed submissions, but moving party failed to secure an order authorizing sealing. The court, thus, will not review any papers until they are all publicly available. Notably, too, Plaintiff filed a notice of settlement entered after the filing of this motion. Thus, it is unclear whether the order requested by this motion is still necessary.
